title: bupleurum lophocarpum
intro: Bupleurum lophocarpum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or Chai hu, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum lophocarpum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Bupleurum lophocarpum can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
